title: dillwynia glaberrima
intro: Dillwynia glaberrima is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, native to eastern Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Dillwynia glaberrima include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues.
